# toll-booth -- Complete API Reference

> L402 payment middleware for Rust. Gates any HTTP API behind Lightning payments.

toll-booth is a Rust crate that adds HTTP 402 payment gating to any API using the L402 protocol (macaroons + Lightning invoices). It verifies payments via preimage, manages credit balances, supports free tiers, tiered pricing, and cost reconciliation. Ships as a Tower Layer for axum.

Source: https://github.com/forgesworn/toll-booth-rs
Licence: MIT

---

## Cargo.toml

```toml
[dependencies]
toll-booth = { version = "0.1", features = ["l402", "axum-middleware"] }
```

### Feature flags

| Feature           | Default | Dependencies                             | What it enables                          |
|-------------------|---------|------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| `l402`            | yes     | (none extra)                             | L402 payment rail                        |
| `axum-middleware` | yes     | axum 0.8, tower 0.5, http 1             | Tower Layer for axum                     |
| `sqlite`          | yes     | rusqlite 0.34 (bundled)                  | SQLite storage backend                   |
| `phoenixd`        | no      | reqwest 0.12                             | Phoenixd Lightning node backend          |

### Always-included dependencies

hmac 0.12, sha2 0.10, subtle 2.6, rand 0.8, hex 0.4, base64 0.22, serde 1, serde_json 1, chrono 0.4, async-trait 0.1, regex 1, once_cell 1, thiserror 2.

---

## Public re-exports (src/lib.rs)

```rust
pub use types::*;
pub use engine::{FreeTierConfig, TollBoothConfig, TollBoothEngine};
pub use storage::{StorageBackend, MemoryStorage};
pub use backends::LightningBackend;
pub use rails::{PaymentRail, L402Rail, L402RailConfig, ChallengeFragment, RailVerifyResult, PaymentMode};
#[cfg(feature = "axum-middleware")]
pub use middleware::TollBoothLayer;
```

---

## Core types (src/types.rs)

### Currency

```rust
#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Default, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub enum Currency {
    #[default]
    Sat,
    Usd,
}
```

### PriceInfo

```rust
pub struct PriceInfo {
    pub sats: Option<u64>,
    pub usd: Option<u64>,
}

impl PriceInfo {
    pub fn sats(amount: u64) -> Self;
    pub fn usd(amount: u64) -> Self;
    pub fn amount_for(&self, currency: Currency) -> u64;
}
```

### PricingEntry

```rust
pub enum PricingEntry {
    Simple(u64),                        // sats
    Detailed(PriceInfo),                // sats + usd
    Tiered(HashMap<String, u64>),       // tier_key -> sats
}

impl PricingEntry {
    pub fn normalise(&self) -> PriceInfo;  // resolves to PriceInfo
    pub fn is_tiered(&self) -> bool;
    pub fn tier_price(&self, tier: &str) -> Option<PriceInfo>;
}
```

### TollBoothRequest

```rust
pub struct TollBoothRequest {
    pub method: String,
    pub path: String,
    pub headers: HashMap<String, String>,
    pub ip: String,
    pub tier: Option<String>,
}

impl TollBoothRequest {
    pub fn header(&self, name: &str) -> Option<&str>;  // case-insensitive lookup
}
```

### TollBoothResult

```rust
pub enum TollBoothResult {
    Proxy {
        upstream: String,
        headers: HashMap<String, String>,
        payment_hash: Option<String>,
        estimated_cost: Option<u64>,
        credit_balance: Option<i64>,
        free_remaining: Option<u64>,
        tier: Option<String>,
    },
    Challenge {
        status: u16,                        // always 402
        headers: HashMap<String, String>,   // includes WWW-Authenticate
        body: serde_json::Value,            // includes l402 object
    },
    Pass {
        upstream: String,
        headers: HashMap<String, String>,
    },
    Blocked {
        status: u16,
        body: serde_json::Value,
    },
}
```

### Invoice types

```rust
pub struct Invoice {
    pub bolt11: String,
    pub payment_hash: String,
}

pub struct InvoiceStatus {
    pub paid: bool,
    pub preimage: Option<String>,
}

pub struct StoredInvoice {
    pub payment_hash: String,
    pub bolt11: String,
    pub amount_sats: u64,
    pub macaroon: String,
    pub status_token: String,
    pub created_at: String,
    pub client_ip: Option<String>,
}
```

### Other types

```rust
pub struct DebitResult {
    pub success: bool,
    pub remaining: i64,
}

pub struct ReconcileResult {
    pub adjusted: bool,
    pub new_balance: i64,
    pub delta: i64,
}
```

### Error types

```rust
pub enum TollBoothError {
    Storage(StorageError),
    Backend(BackendError),
    Rail(RailError),
    Config(String),
}

pub enum StorageError {
    Database(String),
    NotFound(String),
}

pub enum BackendError {
    Request(String),
    NotFound,
    NotSupported,
}

pub enum RailError {
    Challenge(String),
    Verification(String),
}

pub enum MacaroonError {
    InvalidRootKey,
    InvalidPaymentHash,
    Encoding(String),
    VerificationFailed(String),
    InvalidIdentifier(String),
    InvalidCaveat(String),
}
```

### Utility functions

```rust
pub fn is_valid_payment_hash(s: &str) -> bool;  // 64 hex chars
pub fn hash_ip(ip: &str) -> String;              // SHA256(date:ip), truncated to 16 bytes
pub fn is_valid_tier(tier: &str) -> bool;         // lowercase alphanumeric + _ + -, max 32 chars
```

---

## Engine (src/engine.rs)

### FreeTierConfig

```rust
pub enum FreeTierConfig {
    Requests(u64),  // N free requests per day per IP
    Credits(u64),   // N free sats per day per IP
}
```

### TollBoothConfig

```rust
pub struct TollBoothConfig {
    pub storage: Arc<dyn StorageBackend>,
    pub pricing: HashMap<String, PricingEntry>,
    pub upstream: String,
    pub root_key: String,                          // 32-byte hex
    pub rails: Vec<Box<dyn PaymentRail>>,
    pub free_tier: Option<FreeTierConfig>,
    pub service_name: Option<String>,
}

impl Default for TollBoothConfig { ... }  // empty/zero defaults
```

### TollBoothEngine

```rust
pub struct TollBoothEngine { /* private */ }

impl TollBoothEngine {
    pub fn new(config: TollBoothConfig) -> Result<Self, TollBoothError>;
    pub async fn handle(&self, req: &TollBoothRequest) -> TollBoothResult;
    pub fn reconcile(&self, payment_hash: &str, actual_cost: u64) -> ReconcileResult;
}
```

**`handle()` flow:**
1. Check if route exists in pricing table. If not, return `Pass`.
2. Resolve price (with tier support if `X-Toll-Tier` header present).
3. HEAD requests return 402 with price headers only (`X-L402-Price-Sats`, `X-L402-Price-Usd`).
4. Iterate payment rails. For each rail that detects credentials:
   - Verify credentials
   - If authenticated with Credit mode: debit from storage, return `Proxy` with `X-Credit-Balance`
   - If authenticated with PerRequest/Session mode: settle once, return `Proxy`
5. If no rail authenticated: check free tier. If allowed, return `Proxy` with `X-Free-Remaining`.
6. If all else fails: generate 402 `Challenge` from all rails.

**`reconcile()` flow:**
- Compares estimated cost (tracked per payment_hash for 60s) against actual cost
- If overcharged: refunds the difference via `storage.adjust_credits()`
- Returns `ReconcileResult { adjusted, new_balance, delta }`

---

## Payment rails (src/rails/)

### PaymentRail trait

```rust
#[async_trait]
pub trait PaymentRail: Send + Sync {
    fn rail_type(&self) -> &str;
    fn credit_supported(&self) -> bool;
    fn detect(&self, req: &TollBoothRequest) -> bool;
    async fn challenge(&self, route: &str, price: &PriceInfo) -> Result<ChallengeFragment, RailError>;
    async fn verify(&self, req: &TollBoothRequest) -> Result<RailVerifyResult, RailError>;
}
```

### Supporting types

```rust
pub struct ChallengeFragment {
    pub headers: HashMap<String, String>,
    pub body: serde_json::Value,
}

pub struct RailVerifyResult {
    pub authenticated: bool,
    pub payment_id: String,
    pub mode: PaymentMode,
    pub credit_balance: Option<i64>,
    pub currency: Currency,
    pub custom_caveats: HashMap<String, String>,
}

pub enum PaymentMode {
    PerRequest,
    Credit,
    Session,
}
```

### L402Rail (src/rails/l402.rs)

```rust
pub struct L402RailConfig {
    pub root_key: String,                              // 32-byte hex
    pub storage: Arc<dyn StorageBackend>,
    pub default_amount: u64,                           // fallback sats when price has no sats field
    pub backend: Option<Arc<dyn LightningBackend>>,    // None = random payment_hash (dev mode)
    pub service_name: Option<String>,                  // memo for invoices
}

pub struct L402Rail { /* private */ }

impl L402Rail {
    pub fn new(config: L402RailConfig) -> Self;
}
```

**Detection:** looks for `Authorization: L402 ...` header (case-insensitive).

**Challenge:** generates `WWW-Authenticate: L402 macaroon="<b64>", invoice="<bolt11>"` and a JSON body:
```json
{
  "l402": {
    "scheme": "L402",
    "description": "Payment required: <service_name>",
    "invoice": "<bolt11>",
    "macaroon": "<url-safe-base64>",
    "payment_hash": "<64 hex chars>",
    "amount_sats": 100,
    "route": "/v1/chat"
  }
}
```

**Verification flow:**
1. Extract `Authorization: L402 <macaroon_b64>:<preimage_hex>`
2. Verify macaroon HMAC signature against root key (constant-time)
3. Check preimage: SHA256(preimage) == payment_hash (constant-time via `subtle`)
4. Cashu fallback: if Lightning preimage fails, check stored settlement secret
5. First-time settlement: credit balance from macaroon, store settlement secret
6. Return balance from storage

---

## Lightning backends (src/backends/)

### LightningBackend trait

```rust
#[async_trait]
pub trait LightningBackend: Send + Sync {
    async fn create_invoice(&self, amount_sats: u64, memo: Option<&str>) -> Result<Invoice, BackendError>;
    async fn check_invoice(&self, payment_hash: &str) -> Result<InvoiceStatus, BackendError>;
    async fn send_payment(&self, _bolt11: &str) -> Result<PaymentResult, BackendError> {
        Err(BackendError::NotSupported)  // default impl
    }
}

pub struct PaymentResult {
    pub preimage: String,
}
```

### PhoenixdBackend (feature: `phoenixd`)

Connects to a Phoenixd Lightning node via HTTP API.

---

## Storage backends (src/storage/)

### StorageBackend trait

```rust
pub trait StorageBackend: Send + Sync {
    // Balance management
    fn credit(&self, payment_hash: &str, amount: i64, currency: Currency) -> Result<(), StorageError>;
    fn debit(&self, payment_hash: &str, amount: i64, currency: Currency) -> Result<DebitResult, StorageError>;
    fn balance(&self, payment_hash: &str, currency: Currency) -> Result<i64, StorageError>;
    fn adjust_credits(&self, payment_hash: &str, delta: i64, currency: Currency) -> Result<i64, StorageError>;

    // Settlement
    fn settle(&self, payment_hash: &str) -> Result<bool, StorageError>;
    fn settle_with_credit(&self, payment_hash: &str, amount: i64, settlement_secret: Option<&str>, currency: Currency) -> Result<bool, StorageError>;
    fn is_settled(&self, payment_hash: &str) -> Result<bool, StorageError>;
    fn get_settlement_secret(&self, payment_hash: &str) -> Result<Option<String>, StorageError>;

    // Invoice management
    fn store_invoice(&self, invoice: &StoredInvoice) -> Result<(), StorageError>;
    fn get_invoice(&self, payment_hash: &str) -> Result<Option<StoredInvoice>, StorageError>;
    fn get_invoice_for_status(&self, payment_hash: &str, status_token: &str) -> Result<Option<StoredInvoice>, StorageError>;
    fn pending_invoice_count(&self, client_ip: &str) -> Result<u64, StorageError>;

    // Maintenance
    fn prune_expired_invoices(&self, max_age: std::time::Duration) -> Result<u64, StorageError>;
    fn prune_stale_records(&self, max_age: std::time::Duration) -> Result<u64, StorageError>;
}
```

### MemoryStorage

```rust
pub struct MemoryStorage { /* private */ }

impl MemoryStorage {
    pub fn new() -> Self;
}
```

In-memory implementation. Thread-safe via `Mutex`. Suitable for tests and prototypes. Supports dual-currency (Sat + Usd) balances per payment_hash. Has overflow protection (returns error on i64 overflow). Status token comparison uses constant-time equality.

### SqliteStorage (feature: `sqlite`)

SQLite-backed implementation using bundled rusqlite. No system dependency.

---

## axum middleware (src/middleware/axum.rs, feature: `axum-middleware`)

### TollBoothLayer

```rust
pub struct TollBoothLayer { /* private */ }

impl TollBoothLayer {
    pub fn new(engine: TollBoothEngine) -> Self;
    pub fn from_arc(engine: Arc<TollBoothEngine>) -> Self;
}

impl<S> Layer<S> for TollBoothLayer { ... }
```

**Usage:**
```rust
let app = axum::Router::new()
    .route("/v1/chat", axum::routing::post(handler))
    .layer(TollBoothLayer::new(engine));
```

**Behaviour:**
- `Proxy` / `Pass`: injects toll-booth headers into both request (for downstream handlers) and response (for client observability), then forwards to inner service
- `Challenge`: short-circuits with 402 status, JSON body, and `WWW-Authenticate` header
- `Blocked`: short-circuits with 403 status and JSON body

**IP extraction:** prefers `X-Forwarded-For` (first entry), falls back to `X-Real-IP`, defaults to `"unknown"`.

**Tier extraction:** reads `X-Toll-Tier` header.

---

## Macaroon module (src/macaroon.rs)

Internal macaroon implementation using V2 binary format with HMAC-SHA256.

### Public functions

```rust
pub fn mint_macaroon(
    root_key_hex: &str,       // 32-byte hex string
    payment_hash: &str,       // 64 hex chars
    credit_balance: i64,
    custom_caveats: &[String], // "key = value" format
    currency: Currency,
) -> Result<String, MacaroonError>;  // returns URL-safe base64

pub fn verify_macaroon(
    root_key_hex: &str,
    macaroon_b64: &str,
    context: Option<&VerifyContext>,
) -> Result<VerifyResult, MacaroonError>;

pub fn parse_macaroon_caveats(
    macaroon_b64: &str,
) -> Result<HashMap<String, String>, MacaroonError>;
```

### VerifyContext

```rust
pub struct VerifyContext<'a> {
    pub path: Option<&'a str>,
    pub ip: Option<&'a str>,
    pub now: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>,
}
```

### VerifyResult

```rust
pub struct VerifyResult {
    pub valid: bool,
    pub payment_hash: Option<String>,
    pub credit_balance: Option<i64>,
    pub currency: Currency,
    pub custom_caveats: HashMap<String, String>,
}
```

### Reserved caveat keys

`payment_hash`, `credit_balance`, `currency`, `route`, `expires`, `ip`. Custom caveats must not use these keys.

### Caveat format

All caveats use `"key = value"` format (space-equals-space). Route caveats support wildcards: `route = /api/*` matches any path starting with `/api/`.

### L402 Identifier format (66 bytes)

- Bytes 0-1: version (uint16 BE, always 0)
- Bytes 2-33: payment hash (32 bytes)
- Bytes 34-65: random token ID (32 bytes)

### Security properties

- HMAC-SHA256 signatures with derived keys (matching JS macaroon v3 key derivation)
- Constant-time signature comparison via `subtle::ConstantTimeEq`
- Constant-time preimage verification
- Constant-time status token comparison
- Duplicate caveat key rejection
- Reserved key injection prevention
- Balance overflow protection (checked arithmetic)
- IP hashing with daily salt rotation

---

## Free tier (src/free_tier.rs)

### FreeTierConfig in engine

```rust
// In TollBoothConfig:
free_tier: Some(FreeTierConfig::Requests(10)),  // 10 free requests per IP per day
// or:
free_tier: Some(FreeTierConfig::Credits(500)),   // 500 free sats per IP per day
```

**Behaviour:**
- Request-based: counts requests per hashed IP, resets daily
- Credit-based: tracks spent budget per hashed IP, resets daily. Zero-cost requests always pass.
- IP validation: rejects empty, overlength (>64 chars), or non-hex/dot/colon characters
- Capacity limit: 100,000 unique IPs per day (prevents memory exhaustion)

---

## Complete usage example

```rust
use std::sync::Arc;
use toll_booth::{
    TollBoothEngine, TollBoothConfig, FreeTierConfig,
    L402Rail, L402RailConfig,
    MemoryStorage,
    TollBoothLayer,
    PricingEntry,
};

async fn chat_handler() -> &'static str {
    "Hello from the paid API"
}

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() {
    // 1. Storage
    let storage = Arc::new(MemoryStorage::new());

    // 2. L402 payment rail
    let l402 = L402Rail::new(L402RailConfig {
        root_key: std::env::var("L402_ROOT_KEY")
            .expect("L402_ROOT_KEY must be a 64-char hex string"),
        storage: storage.clone(),
        default_amount: 100,        // sats, used when price has no sats field
        backend: None,              // None = dev mode (random payment hashes)
        service_name: Some("My Chat API".to_string()),
    });

    // 3. Pricing table
    let mut pricing = std::collections::HashMap::new();
    pricing.insert("/v1/chat".to_string(), PricingEntry::Simple(100));
    pricing.insert("/v1/image".to_string(), PricingEntry::Simple(500));

    // 4. Engine
    let engine = TollBoothEngine::new(TollBoothConfig {
        storage,
        pricing,
        upstream: "http://127.0.0.1:8080".into(),
        root_key: std::env::var("L402_ROOT_KEY").unwrap(),
        rails: vec![Box::new(l402)],
        free_tier: Some(FreeTierConfig::Requests(10)),  // 10 free per day
        service_name: Some("My Chat API".to_string()),
        ..Default::default()
    })
    .unwrap();

    // 5. axum app with toll-booth middleware
    let app = axum::Router::new()
        .route("/v1/chat", axum::routing::post(chat_handler))
        .layer(TollBoothLayer::new(engine));

    // 6. Serve
    let listener = tokio::net::TcpListener::bind("0.0.0.0:3000").await.unwrap();
    println!("Listening on :3000");
    axum::serve(listener, app).await.unwrap();
}
```

## L402 protocol flow

```
Client                              Server (toll-booth)
  |                                       |
  |-- GET /v1/chat ---------------------->|
  |                                       | pricing table lookup: 100 sats
  |                                       | no Authorization header
  |                                       | free tier: check (may allow)
  |                                       | if denied:
  |<-- 402 Payment Required --------------|
  |    WWW-Authenticate: L402 macaroon="...", invoice="..."
  |    Body: { "l402": { "invoice": "lnbc1...", "macaroon": "...",
  |            "payment_hash": "abc...", "amount_sats": 100 } }
  |                                       |
  |-- Pay Lightning invoice ------------->| (out of band)
  |<-- Preimage (32 bytes hex) ----------|
  |                                       |
  |-- GET /v1/chat ---------------------->|
  |   Authorization: L402 <macaroon>:<preimage_hex>
  |                                       | verify macaroon HMAC (constant-time)
  |                                       | verify SHA256(preimage) == payment_hash
  |                                       | first use: settle + credit 100 sats
  |                                       | debit 100 sats -> balance 0
  |<-- 200 OK ----------------------------|
  |    X-Credit-Balance: 0               |
  |                                       |
  |-- GET /v1/chat ---------------------->|  (same credentials)
  |   Authorization: L402 <macaroon>:<preimage_hex>
  |                                       | balance 0 < cost 100
  |<-- 402 Payment Required --------------|  (new invoice)
```
